inputs.label: Coverage Level
inputs.businessContext: Coverage type: 1 = Liability only, 2 = Standard, 3 = Comprehensive. Acts as multiplier.

businessContext_i18n.en: Coverage type: 1 = Liability only, 2 = Standard, 3 = Comprehensive. Acts as multiplier.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teminat türü: 1 = Sadece sorumluluk, 2 = Standart, 3 = Kapsamlı. Çarpan olarak çalışır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Deckungsart: 1 = Nur Haftpflicht, 2 = Standard, 3 = Vollkasko. Wirkt als Multiplikator.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Type de couverture : 1 = Responsabilité civile uniquement, 2 = Standard, 3 = Tous risques. Agit comme multiplicateur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tipo de cobertura: 1 = Solo responsabilidad civil, 2 = Estándar, 3 = Integral. Actúa como multiplicador.

inputs.label: Deductible Amount
inputs.businessContext: Amount the insured pays out-of-pocket before coverage kicks in.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount the insured pays out-of-pocket before coverage kicks in.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teminat devreye girmeden önce sigortalının cepten ödediği tutar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag, den der Versicherte vor Leistungserbringung selbst zahlt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant que l'assuré paie de sa poche avant que la couverture ne s'applique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad que paga el asegurado de su bolsillo antes de que la cobertura entre en vigor.

inputs.businessContext: Age of the vehicle from manufacturing year.
